goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park' and should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 09:15' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park and should be in the south
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 09:15 and should leave on friday
Make sure you get train ID
